• 2D multiplayer mining game with real-time physics and procedurally generated terrain.
  • Supports cross-platform play with mobile touch controls and desktop keyboard/mouse input.
  • Features upgrade system, inventory management, shop, and multiplayer chat with MQTT networking.
    const TILE_PROPS = { [TILE_TYPES.DIAMOND]: { name: "Diamond", color: '#3498db', hardness: 3, value: 500, tier: 3, trashExclude: true } };
    const CONSTANTS = { TILE_SIZE: 32, CHUNK_SIZE: 16, MAP_WIDTH: 1000, MAP_HEIGHT: 2000 };

Mega Miner NG is a cross-platform multiplayer mining game featuring procedurally generated terrain, real-time physics, and an upgrade system. Players can mine various ores, build structures, and trade resources while exploring an infinite underground world. The game supports both desktop and mobile controls with MQTT networking for multiplayer functionality.
